en.name: Sphere Volume Calculator
en.desc: Sphere Volume Calculator. Free online calculator with formula, examples and step-by-step guide.
en.seo_title: Sphere Volume Calculator – Free Online Tool
en.seo_description: Calculate Volume = (4/3) × π × r³. Example: radius 3 m = Volume = 113.1 m³. Free and accurate calculator, no signup needed.
en.example_label: Calculate volume and surface area of a spherical storage tank with 3.75m radius
en.result_context: The volumen ({volumen}) is the capacity inside the sphere; superficie ({superficie}) is the total outer surface area for coating or insulation calculations.
en.formula_display: Volume = (4/3) × π × r³ | Surface Area = 4 × π × r²
mistakes: Using r² instead of r³ in volume formula
Forgetting the 4/3 coefficient in volume calculation
Confusing sphere surface (4πr²) with circle area (πr²)
